scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others --names 'USER,AUTH,SCORE,FRONTEND' --prefix-colors 'auto' 'npm run dev --workspace=user-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=auth-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=score-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=web'
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently --kill-others --names 'USER,AUTH,SCORE' --prefix-colors 'auto' 'npm run dev --workspace=user-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=auth-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=score-service'
scripts.start: echo 'Use: npm run start:[user, auth, score]'
scripts.start:all: concurrently --kill-others --names 'USER,AUTH,SCORE' --prefix-colors 'auto' 'npm run start:user' 'npm run start:auth' 'npm run start:score'
